jellyfin.title: Jellyfin Connection
jellyfin.description:
Connect Voice Jellyfin to your media server. You can find your API key in **Jellyfin → Dashboard → API Keys → + Add**.

{status}

data_description.jellyfin_url: Full URL including port — e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8096 or https://jellyfin.yourdomain.com
data_description.jellyfin_api_key: Create one in Jellyfin → Dashboard → API Keys. Do not use your login password.
data_description.jellyfin_username: Optional — used to look up your User ID automatically.
data_description.jellyfin_default_user: Optional — used for resume, favorites, and history. Leave blank to detect from active sessions.
data_description.jellyfin_verify_ssl: Disable if using a self-signed certificate (e.g. Tailscale or local HTTPS).
data_description.test_connection: Check this to verify your credentials without saving — the page will reload with a result.

tv_device.title: TV / Playback Device
tv_device.description: Choose the device Voice Jellyfin will control for navigation and remote keys. Select **None** if you only want voice search and playback without remote control.

data_description.tv_type: Android TV / Fire TV uses the androidtv HA integration. Apple TV uses the Apple TV HA integration. None = voice commands only, no remote keys.

apple_tv.title: Apple TV
apple_tv.description: Select your Apple TV entity. Make sure the Apple TV integration is set up in HA first.

data_description.apple_tv_entity: The remote.* or media_player.* entity for your Apple TV from the Apple TV integration.
data_description.tv_wake_support: Send a wake signal to the Apple TV before playing. Useful if it goes to sleep.

android_tv.title: Android TV / Fire TV
android_tv.description: Select your Android TV or Fire TV entity. For best results install the **Android TV** integration (not just Cast).

data_description.android_tv_entity: The media_player.* entity created by the Android TV or Fire TV Stick integration in HA.
data_description.adb_host: Optional — IP address of the TV for direct ADB commands (e.g. app launch, deep links). Leave blank to use HA services only.
data_description.adb_port: ADB port on the TV. Default is 5555. Enable ADB debugging on the device: Settings → Device Options → Developer Options.
data_description.tv_wake_support: Wake the TV before issuing play commands. Recommended for Fire TV devices that auto-sleep.

ai_provider.title: AI Provider
ai_provider.description:
Choose the AI brain that interprets your voice commands into actions.

- **Home Assistant Conversation** — free, uses your existing HA AI setup
- **Ollama** — free, runs locally on your machine (private, no internet)
- **OpenAI / Anthropic / Gemini** — cloud, most accurate, requires API key
- **OpenAI-Compatible** — any local server (LM Studio, vLLM, Ollama OpenAI mode)
- **None** — rule-based only, works for simple commands without AI

cloud_provider.title: Cloud AI Credentials
cloud_provider.description: Enter your API credentials for the selected provider.

data_description.ai_api_key: Your API key from the provider's developer console. Never share this.
data_description.ai_model: Leave blank to use the provider's recommended default. Example: gpt-4o, claude-3-haiku-20240307.
data_description.ai_base_url: Only needed for non-standard endpoints. Leave blank for official cloud APIs.
data_description.ai_temperature: Controls creativity vs. precision. Lower = more precise (0.1–0.4 recommended for commands).
data_description.ai_max_tokens: Maximum length of the AI's reply. 256–512 is plenty for voice commands.
data_description.ai_streaming: Stream the response token-by-token. Reduces latency but uses a persistent connection.
data_description.ai_timeout: Seconds to wait for an AI response before giving up. Increase for slow connections.

ollama.title: Ollama — Local AI
ollama.description:
Ollama runs AI models privately on your own hardware — no data leaves your home.

Make sure Ollama is running and reachable from Home Assistant before continuing.

data_description.ollama_host: Hostname or IP where Ollama is running. Use localhost if on the same machine as HA.
data_description.ollama_port: Default is 11434. Change only if you configured a custom port.
data_description.ollama_https: Enable only if Ollama is behind a reverse proxy with TLS.

ollama_model.title: Ollama — Model & Settings
ollama_model.description: Select the model to use for voice commands. **llama3** or **mistral** work well. Pull models with `ollama pull <model>` before selecting.

data_description.ollama_model: The model must already be downloaded on your Ollama server.
data_description.ollama_context_size: Tokens to keep in memory. 4096 is fine for voice commands — larger values use more RAM.
data_description.ollama_keep_alive: How long to keep the model in GPU/CPU memory between commands. 5m = 5 minutes, 0 = unload immediately.
data_description.ai_streaming: Stream tokens as they arrive. Slightly faster perceived response.
data_description.ai_timeout: Seconds before timing out. Local models can be slow — 30–60s is safe for first-load.

openai_compat.title: OpenAI-Compatible Endpoint
openai_compat.description: Use any server that speaks the OpenAI API — LM Studio, vLLM, Ollama in OpenAI mode, or a custom proxy.

data_description.ai_base_url: Full URL to the API root — e.g. http://192.168.1.50:1234/v1 for LM Studio.
data_description.ai_api_key: Enter any non-empty string if the server doesn't require auth (e.g. 'not-needed').
data_description.ai_model: Model identifier as the server expects it — e.g. mistral or llama-3-8b-instruct.
data_description.ai_streaming: Stream the response. Disable if your server has issues with streaming.
data_description.ai_timeout: Seconds to wait. Local models can be slow on first inference — 30–60s recommended.

nav_mode.title: Navigation Mode
nav_mode.description:
Navigation Mode lets you control your TV with simple voice commands like **up**, **down**, **select**, **back**, **home** — without needing AI for each command.

Activate it by saying the wake phrase through any HA voice assistant.

data_description.nav_wake_phrase: Say this exact phrase to enter Navigation Mode. Default: 'navigation mode'.
data_description.nav_timeout: Seconds of inactivity before Navigation Mode turns off automatically. 0 = never.
data_description.nav_continuous: Keep listening after each command so you don't have to re-trigger the wake word.
data_description.nav_confirmation_speech: Speak a short confirmation message when a nav command is recognised.

accessibility_button.title: Physical Button (Optional)
accessibility_button.description: Optionally link any HA entity — a button, toggle, or input — to activate Navigation Mode. Perfect for a bedside button or remote shortcut.

data_description.button_entity: Any HA entity: input_button, binary_sensor, script, etc. Leave blank to skip.
data_description.button_trigger: What state change activates Navigation Mode. 'Pressed' works for most buttons.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect — check the URL and make sure Jellyfin is running.
error.invalid_auth: API key rejected — create a new one in Jellyfin → Dashboard → API Keys.
error.connection_ok: ✓ Connected — server is reachable and the API key is valid.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the HA logs for details.

abort.already_configured: Voice Jellyfin is already set up. Edit settings from the integration page.

jellyfin.title: Jellyfin Connection
jellyfin.description:
Update your server address or API key. Changing the URL or key triggers a catalog re-index.

{status}

data_description.jellyfin_url: Full URL including port — e.g. http://192.168.1.10:8096
data_description.jellyfin_api_key: Found in Jellyfin → Dashboard → API Keys.
data_description.jellyfin_verify_ssl: Disable for self-signed certs (Tailscale, local HTTPS).
data_description.test_connection: Verify credentials without saving. The page reloads with the result.
data_description.catalog_reindex_interval: How often to refresh the local media catalog used for voice search. Manual = never automatic.

ai_provider.title: AI Settings
ai_provider.description: Turn AI on or off and switch providers. Without AI, only simple rule-based commands work (play, pause, stop, navigate).

data_description.ai_enabled: When off, Voice Jellyfin uses keyword matching only — fast but limited.
data_description.ai_provider: The AI service that interprets natural language voice commands.

ollama.title: Ollama — Local AI
ollama.description: Ollama runs AI models privately on your hardware. Make sure it is reachable from HA.

data_description.ollama_host: IP or hostname of the machine running Ollama.
data_description.ollama_https: Enable if behind a TLS reverse proxy.

ollama_model.title: Ollama — Model & Settings
ollama_model.description: Pick a model and tune its performance. The model must be pulled on your Ollama server first.

data_description.ollama_model: Run `ollama list` on your server to see available models.
data_description.ollama_context_size: 4096 is enough for voice commands. Larger = more RAM.
data_description.ollama_keep_alive: How long to keep the model loaded. 5m is a good balance.
data_description.ai_streaming: Stream tokens for faster perceived response.
data_description.ai_timeout: Local models can take 10–30s on first run. 60s is safe.

cloud_provider.title: Cloud AI Credentials
cloud_provider.description: Update your API key or model for the selected cloud provider.

data_description.ai_api_key: Your provider API key. Stored securely in HA.
data_description.ai_model: Leave blank to use the default. e.g. gpt-4o, claude-3-haiku-20240307.
data_description.ai_timeout: Seconds before giving up on an AI response.

openai_compat.title: OpenAI-Compatible Endpoint
openai_compat.description: Update settings for your local or custom OpenAI-compatible server.

data_description.ai_api_key: Use any non-empty string if auth is not required.
data_description.ai_model: Exact model name the server expects.
data_description.ai_streaming: Disable if the server has streaming issues.
data_description.ai_timeout: 30–60s for local models on first inference.

tv.title: TV Device Type
tv.description: Change the type of device used for remote control and navigation.

data_description.tv_type: Changing this will require selecting a new entity on the next screen.

apple_tv.title: Apple TV
apple_tv.description: Update the Apple TV entity used for remote navigation.

data_description.apple_tv_entity: The remote.* or media_player.* entity from the Apple TV integration.
data_description.tv_wake_support: Wake the Apple TV before issuing play commands.

android_tv.title: Android TV / Fire TV
android_tv.description: Update the device entity used for remote navigation and app launching.

data_description.android_tv_entity: The media_player.* entity from the Android TV integration.
data_description.adb_host: Optional direct ADB IP for app launching and deep links.
data_description.adb_port: Default 5555. Enable ADB debugging on the TV first.
data_description.tv_wake_support: Send wake signal before play commands. Recommended for Fire TV.

nav.title: Navigation & Button
nav.description: Update Navigation Mode settings and the optional physical trigger button.

data_description.nav_wake_phrase: Say this to enter Navigation Mode. Default: 'navigation mode'.
data_description.nav_timeout: Seconds before Navigation Mode auto-exits. 0 = stays on forever.
data_description.nav_confirmation_speech: Say a short reply after each nav command is recognised.
data_description.button_entity: Any HA entity that triggers Navigation Mode when activated. Leave blank for none.
data_description.hot_mic_phrase: Say this phrase to toggle Hot Mic mode. In Hot Mic mode every utterance is treated as a command — no wake word needed. Default: 'hey jellyfin'.
data_description.hot_mic_timeout: Seconds of silence before Hot Mic turns off automatically. 0 = never.

reindex.title: Re-index Media Catalog
reindex.description:
Trigger an immediate re-scan of your Jellyfin library. This updates the local search catalog used for voice play commands.

{status}

test.title: Voice Command Tester
test.description:
Test voice search and playback without speaking. Type a query to see what Voice Jellyfin would find and play.

{results}

data_description.query: Type what you would say — e.g. 'The Dark Knight' or 'a comedy from 2010'.
data_description.type_filter: Narrow results to movies, shows, or episodes.
data_description.action: Search only shows results. Play sends the top result to the TV.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect — check the URL and make sure Jellyfin is running.
error.invalid_auth: API key rejected — create a new one in Jellyfin → Dashboard → API Keys.
error.connection_ok: ✓ Connected — server is reachable and the API key is valid.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the HA logs for details.
